Reference documentation

Modules

 Application Library
 Group of functions devoted to parametrize the GEM application.
 AV-protocol Library
 Group of functions devoted to handle efficiently the AV protocol.
 BubbleGEM Library
 Group of functions devoted to handle efficiently the BubbleGEM system.
 Configuration Library
 Group of functions devoted to WinDom configuration file management.
 Data Library
 To link data to windows.
 Event Library
 Catch and handle GEM events.
 Formular Library
 Display and handle formulars.
 Mouse Library
 Utility functions related to mouse.
 Frame Library
 Divide windows into hierachical and independante frames.
 Font Library
 Utility functions related to fonts.
 Selector Library
 File and Font selectors support.
 Menu Library
 Group of functions related to desktop and window menu handling.
 Object Library
 Group of functions for controling efficiently AES objects.
 Window Library
 Manipulate AES Windows in WinDom.
 Slider Library
 Efficient management of slider objects in formulars.
 Resource Library
 Using external and internal resource file.
 Inquire Library
 Group of functions inquiring to OS a feature.
 Utility Library
 Group of usefull and diverse functions.
 List Library
 Some usefull functions and macro to handle a double chained list of any type of structure.
 Standard callback functions
 Group of predefined callback functions attributed by WindCreate().
 WinDom constants and macros
 Thematic list and signification of all WinDom constants and macro functions.
 Component Library
 Group of functions to manage COMPONENTs.
